creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Thu, Feb 24, 2000 at 07:49:15PM -0800, rbt@zort.on.ca wrote:
> >Synopsis:       Update: QHacc upgrade to 0.3.1 from 0.2.8

Why, thank you for doing this for me. I was planning on doing it as soon
as I finished doing a full test of the Qt/KDE programs. :-)

> >Fix:
> diff -ruN qhacc.old/Makefile qhacc/Makefile
> --- qhacc.old/Makefile  Thu Feb 24 21:41:23 2000
> +++ qhacc/Makefile      Thu Feb 24 21:42:41 2000
> @@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
>  # $FreeBSD: ports/misc/qhacc/Makefile,v 1.2 2000/02/21 03:48:25 cpiazza Exp $
>  #
>  
> -DISTNAME=      qhacc_0.2.8
> -PKGNAME=       qhacc-0.2.8
> +DISTNAME=      qhacc_0.3.1
> +PKGNAME=       qhacc-0.3.1
>  CATEGORIES=    misc
>  MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.ostrich-emulators.cx/qhacc/
>  
> diff -ruN qhacc.old/files/md5 qhacc/files/md5
> --- qhacc.old/files/md5 Thu Feb 24 21:41:22 2000
> +++ qhacc/files/md5     Thu Feb 24 21:43:20 2000
> @@ -1 +1 @@
> -MD5 (qhacc_0.2.8.tar.gz) = 396fdac7ab386b1e872ae24bd561793e
> +MD5 (qhacc_0.3.1.tar.gz) = 64825f41fdba9b9ba856d6ff5642043b

This looks fine to me. Thanks for checking this out. :-)

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
